prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约15582→16499→15469→20005→21489，整体呈后移趋势，尤其2024年起位次大幅后移约5000名；2025年基准约21489名，近两年累计后 移约6000名，竞争明显加剧；该校在湖北省物理类招生计划2021–2022年均为28人，2023年增至35人，2024–2025年稳定在36人。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名约第101位（2026年），近年排名在90–105之间波动，整体层次稳定。 2023年高考周期内因师德师风事件获偏负面评价；抖音综合热度排名第84位（评价一般），短视频平台曝光量处于中低水平，未出现明显报考关注升温信号；未 见投档线异常记录。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气 工程及其自动化等工科专业持续高热推荐，对物理类考生吸引力强；湖北省2026年高考总报名约39.37万人，按近年比例估算物理类约25.1万人，较2025年小幅增加约0.5%，竞争 略有加剧；省控线2025年物理类本科批426分，近年波动不大；安徽大学位于安徽省合肥市，与湖北省相邻，跨省报考的地域偏好适中；该校在湖北省招生人数 占比较小（约0.5%–1%），属省外招生规模正常水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年湖北省物理类考生小幅增加、招生计划持平，以及工科专业持续高热 对报考的拉动作用，预计2026年竞争较2025年进一步加剧；预测最低位次约21689名，区间21189–22189名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 15582 → 16499 → 15469 → 20005 → 21489, showing an overall backward trend, especially from 2024 onward with a significant backward shift of about 5000 places; the 2025 baseline is about 21489, with a cumulative backward shift of about 6000 places in the last two years, indicating intensified competition; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hubei Province was 28 students in 2021–2022, increased to 35 in 2023, and stabilized at 36 in 2024–2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 101st on the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking (2026), with fluctuations between 90–105 in recent years, maintaining a stable overall level. During the 2023 college entrance examination cycle, it received somewhat negative evaluations due to teacher ethics incidents; ranked 84th in comprehensive Douyin popularity (average evaluation), with mid-to-low exposure on short video platforms, showing no clear signs of increased application attention; no abnormal admission score records were observed.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, strongly attracting Physics Category candidates; the total number of Hubei Province college entrance examination registrants in 2026 is approximately 393,700, with an estimated Physics Category of about 251,000 based on recent proportions, a slight increase of about 0.5% compared to 2025, indicating slightly intensified competition; the provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch in 2025 was 426 points, with little fluctuation in recent years; Anhui University is located in Hefei, Anhui Province, adjacent to Hubei Province, with moderate cross-province application regional preference; the university's enrollment proportion in Hubei Province is relatively small (about 0.5%–1%), which is normal for out-of-province enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, a slight increase in Physics Category candidates in Hubei Province in 2026, a stable enrollment plan, and the pulling effect of persistently popular engineering majors, competition is expected to further intensify compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 21689, with a range of 21189–22189.
